debug_info.goal:
case h.refine_1.refine_2.«1»
⊢ lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1)) + lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1 ^ 2)) ≤
    lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 0 ^ 2 + X 1 ^ 3 + X 2 ^ 4 + X 3 ^ 5))

failed_attempts:
exact le_of_eq (by simp)
      try sorry -- compare degree

·
        simpa using (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
      try sorry -- compare degree

·
        simpa using le_add_of_nonneg_left (by simp)
      try sorry -- compare degree

·
        simpa using
          (by
            have : lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1)) + lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1 ^ 2)) =
                lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1 ^ 3)) := by
                  simp
            -- `X 1 ^ 3` is a term of the polynomial, so its degree is ≤ the whole sum's degree
            -- the following lemma is available in `Groebner.Basic`
            simpa [this] using lex.degree_monomial_le_degree_add_of_mem
              (p := (X 0 ^ 2 + X 1 ^ 3 + X 2 ^ 4 + X 3 ^ 5 : MvPolynomial (Fin 4) ℚ))
              (m := X 1 ^ 3)
              (by simp))
      try sorry -- compare degree

·
        simpa using
          (add_le_add_left (b := lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1 ^ 2)))
            (a := lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1)))
            (c := lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 0 ^ 2 + X 1 ^ 3 + X 2 ^ 4 + X 3 ^ 5))))
      try sorry -- compare degree

·
        simpa using
          (le_trans (by simpa using (le_add_of_nonneg_right (show 0 ≤ lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 1)) by simp)))
            (by
              simpa [add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
                (le_add_of_nonneg_left (show 0 ≤ lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 0 ^ 2 + X 2 ^ 4 + X 3 ^ 5)) by simp))))
      try sorry -- compare degree
